title: Why ChatGPT isn't good at building automations
summary: David Ondrej argues that ChatGPT is not well-suited for building automations. The video promotes Creao as an alternative tool designed for automation building.
writeup: David Ondrej argues that ChatGPT is a poor fit for building automation systems, pointing to inherent limitations in that domain. The video frames the issue against the broader context of prompt engineering and LLMs, and it implies that specialized alternatives are better suited to the task.
